summary: Completed the bounded SpecBridge v2 cross-reference validation phase for issue #258. Claude Code ran first and left partial changes after a timeout; Codex reviewed, corrected, completed, tested, committed, pushed, and verified CI. The v2 validator now rejects missing allowed_paths entries, rejects forbidden_paths directory prefixes and wildcard patterns that match tracked files, preserves exact forbidden_paths entries as protected-path declarations, and keeps the exit-code contract and JSON report schema unchanged. The v2 commit 95870cc672fb2fafe6bea9fd477017a5608e1833 was pushed to origin/master and GitHub Actions CI passed.

policy_result: Within the dedicated issue #258 contract. The work did not access secrets, install dependencies, change production configuration, billing, authentication, authorization, databases, deployment automation, hosted runtimes, external AI providers, mutation-capable MCP tools, repository visibility, CI workflow security, force push, branch deletion, or remote deletion. The only network operation after local validation was the authorized normal non-force push to specbridge-v2 origin/master and GitHub CI/status reads.
risk_result: Medium-risk validator work was bounded to declared v2 files and additive tests. Residual risk is limited to v1 evidence not being merged into main and existing v2 branch protection remaining unavailable without GitHub Pro or public visibility.
unresolved_risks: The v1 evidence branch is local and not merged into main.
specbridge-v2 master remains unprotected because branch protection was previously blocked by GitHub plan/private visibility.
Exact forbidden_paths entries are declarations, not enforcement against currently tracked files; broad enforcement is limited to directory prefixes and wildcard patterns by design.
merge_status: v2 master updated by normal non-force push. No autonomous merge into v1 main was performed; v1 evidence remains on branch codex/issue-255-serious-product-build-pilot and requires PR, CI, review, and explicit operator merge authority.
deployment_status: Not applicable. No deployment was requested or performed.
